description: Import the GPS track file /home/ga/Documents/angels_landing_trail.gpx into Google Earth Pro. Adjust the 3D view to show the complete trail overlaid on Zion National Park's canyon terrain with a tilted perspective emphasizing elevation changes. Export a high-resolution image (at least 1920x1080) showing the track on terrain to /home/ga/Documents/angels_landing_visualization.jpg.

metadata.data_source: USGS topographic data and NPS trail documentation
